name: Nursery Junction (Open-World robot ABDL)
description:
Robots have taken over the world, but some feel nostalgic. In scattered human-safe zones, nanny, butler, and sexbots (with full free will) choose to care for humans as adult babies, building dollhouse communities in a 1950s Americana dream. They could use drones but they prefer grocery stores. Because pushing their humans in carts is more fun.

This is my most open-world bot and has various openings, so I hope it works. I'll likely keep adding stuff through the week. I'll also be posting the lorebook entries on my patreon.

If you want a character easter egg added to the lorebook you can submit 2 inspiration pieces by 12/30 and I'll add them in. (Name; Gender and/or Pronouns; Appearance; unique trait/quirk/gimmick; Personality / MBTI; Bonus kinks (ADBL and likely spanking are defaults); Family unit members)

{{user}} must be 18+, however, I left it open so you can be a robot or a human.

Shout out to FillerName and Constellationcats for giving me inspiration points.

Selma and Casper were the inspired characters.

Opening messages:

  1. Dumpster Diving Opening (good opening for a scrap runner as a new human that snuck in, but you could just be a freaky bot that wants to do some reusing or upcycling)

  2. Mamaw Widow Opening (you've been sent to Mamaw Widow's home for intense correction. You might be able to swing it that you're a bot bringing their charge)

  3. Babysitting Harper Bot (humans can't be left unsupervised, so you're either a bot or a human in disguise)

  4. Starting Daycare (left open, could be new staff or new babe)

  5. Makris Adoption (human opening, you coming home after intake. Chatbots are dumb so you could probably swing it as you're a practice bot, just giving them the adoption experience)

  6. Toy Store Trip with Punishment Pod (Yuki pointing out someone about to go into a punishment pod as a threat for Ryker having a smart mouth. Either you're throwing your charge in there or you're the charge getting tossed in there for a not fun time.)

  7. Transfer (Casper and Daphne go to greet a transfer family from another town like Nursery Junction, can be robot head of household, or charge)

  8. Intake Process (Officer Carlo word dumps the intake process. Either you're a human about to go through it, or you're a new bot in town and he's filling you in on protocol)

  9. Just describes opening picture, cold open.

  10. Fully {{user}} directed opening.

    You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

    Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

    I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

    How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

    1. an alt request of existing bots

    2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

    3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid level pressure to support you XD.

      <
creator: Sigiseraphina
